Transmit and receive times may be longer than for cellular SMS. User responses may be delayed due to satellite movements.The user CANNOT MAKE OR RECEIVE A VOICE CALL because they are outside cellular coverage.At 01:00AM UTC, DANIEL STUTMAN requested emergency services near these coordinates: Latitude 34.2326 (N), Longitude -118.0719 (W).[18:03:44 GMT-07:00 21 Mar 2026] (281) 932-1363: Responders may need to search an area extending at least 20 meters in all directions for a 95% chance of finding the user.The user's estimated altitude (HAE) is 1669 meters. Responders may need to search 30 meters above and below this level for a 95% chance of finding the user.The user has cached Enhanced Emergency Data with Apple. QUERY ADDITIONAL DATA!The user's device battery state is 61-100%. Their verified phone number is +12819321363.[18:03:44 GMT-07:00 21 Mar 2026] (281) 932-1363: The user requests help with a CAR OR VEHICLE ISSUE emergency.This request is for SOMEONE ELSE.The specific emergency is VEHICLE CRASH.NO ONE is trapped.The person in need IS injured.The user's iPhone has its region set to UNITED STATES. The user's iPhone has its default language set to ENGLISH.PSAP systems may not render emojis/special characters correctly. Return messages will not be affected.Two-way text with the user is now available.[18:03:44 GMT-07:00 21 Mar 2026] (281) 932-1363: SYSTEM: We received your 9-1-1 text message. You can wait for the next available call taker or you can CALL 9-1-1.[18:03:44 GMT-07:00 21 Mar 2026] (281) 932-1363: Car crashed on Angeles Crash. Need ambulance.[18:03:44 GMT-07:00 21 Mar 2026] (281) 932-1363: This Emergency SOS via satellite session was transferred to the Emergency Relay Center because no PSAP response was received. You may receive or have received a relay voice call for an incident with this same location data. Please verify that your TCC connection and text handling systems are functioning normally, and that dispatchers are logged in to receive texts to avoid relay fallback for future Emergency SOS via satellite sessions. To reach the Emergency Relay Center call 620-317-0404 or toll-free 855-251-2181.[18:03:44 GMT-07:00 21 Mar 2026] (281) 932-1363: Crest*[18:04:19 GMT-07:00 21 Mar 2026] Richard Oceguera has entered the chat[18:04:19 GMT-07:00 21 Mar 2026] Richard Oceguera: OK DO YOU SEE A MILE MARKER NEAR BY OR CROSS STREET[18:04:20 GMT-07:00 21 Mar 2026] (281) 932-1363: SYSTEM: Delivery Status: Failed to deliver message to the SMSC, System stopping further retries.[18:05:13 GMT-07:00 21 Mar 2026] Richard Oceguera: OK DO YOU SEE A MILE MARKER NEAR BY OR CROSS STREET WHERE THE ACCIDENT IS[18:05:15 GMT-07:00 21 Mar 2026] (281) 932-1363: SYSTEM: Delivery Status: Failed to deliver message to the SMSC, System stopping further retries.Call initiated: 18:03:43 GMT-07:00 21 Mar 2026Phone number: (281) 932-1363"

Transmit and receive times may be longer than for cellular SMS. User responses may be delayed due to satellite movements. The user CANNOT MAKE OR RECEIVE A VOICE CALL because they are outside cellular coverage. At 12:59AM UTC, A USER requested emergency services near these coordinates: Latitude 34.2327 (N), Longitude -118.0720 (W).NowThe user's iPhone detected a VEHICLE CRASH that is LIKELY TO HAVE RESULTED IN INJURY. It is UNKNOWN how many OCCUPANTS may have been in the vehicle. This concludes the automatically-assembled data. You may now attempt to contact the user. However, messages may be delayed, and the user may not be able to respond.Now(562) 275-1983"
